---
title: "disable_stragglers.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/disable_stragglers.js"
loc: 25
complexity: 3
logic_score: 5.75
style_score: 8.94
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 8.65
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fs)

### Exports
- `addDisable`
- `content`
- `socket`
